description: Coches.net is a Spanish online marketplace for cars and related motor listings, and is part of Adevinta Spain. Its public website focuses on classifieds, vehicle search, news, and related content.
summary: coches.net exposes three cataloged public MCP servers (coches.net, motos.net, and Milanuncios) under llms-apps.gw.coches.net; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found for coches.net itself.
